information.en: Define the config to be executed by MRD server
Pass the original 2D image stream back for scanner postprocessing

Experimental whole-body composing pass-through. With Send original images, return each original with its native source series identity preserved (source SeriesInstanceUID/grouping, series number, ImageType and Dixon sub-type tokens, slice/partition counters, and IceMiniHead) instead of splitting contrasts onto renumbered original series with fresh UIDs. ImageTypeValue3 is normalized to M (mirroring the musclemap pass-through) instead of stripped, so the inline Dixon composer keeps each contrast bound to its Dixon channel and the master FILTER channel stays empty like a native acquisition; Keep_image_geometry is forced to 1. Use to test whether inline Composing of the original multi-station Dixon stations works when the returned originals are not re-stamped. Bypasses the restamped-output contract validation for the originals.
Interpolate between slices and send one volume with twice as many slices

name.en: 2D main-channel composable (experimental: compose mask in master FILTER)

information.en: Choose the geometry, header identity, and scanner postprocessing stream used for Segment. Explicit volume sends one derived 3D volume with Keep_image_geometry=0 and DataRole=Image; scanner postprocessing uses originals only. 3D and 2D segmentation header modes keep Keep_image_geometry=1 and DataRole=Segmentation; scanner postprocessing uses the segment stream. 2D segmentation header, originals postprocessed keeps the same source geometry and segmentation header identity but leaves the segment stream without scanner postprocessing child-role metadata. 2D derived image header keeps source geometry with DataRole=Image and a derived ImageType. 2D source image header keeps source geometry with DataRole=Image and the source ImageType/ImageTypeValue4 identity. The two 2D image-header modes use originals plus the segment stream when originals are enabled.

In a Dixon sequence, compute the segmentation from the WATER contrast only (images whose ImageType carries the WATER Dixon token), producing a single mask series instead of one per contrast. Required for and forced on by segmentheadergeometry=2d_main_composable. If no WATER contrast is detected, all magnitude images are segmented.
Add MicroDeltaHotMetal.pal LUT metadata to segmentation outputs
Send explicit sagittal 3D reformat volume(s) of the segment data, one per source group
Send explicit coronal 3D reformat volume(s) of the segment data, one per source group
Compute and send one maximum intensity projection image
Send region volume in image comments and as a DICOM metrics table image
